text.title: Storybook Story Authoring Rules
text.summary: CSF3 story requirements: StoryObj, tags, args, argTypes, play functions, and MDX documentation structure.

rule.statement: Every story file must use CSF3: default-export Meta satisfies Meta<typeof Component>, named StoryObj exports, tags: ['autodocs'] in the meta.
rule.rationale: autodocs tag enables automatic documentation page generation. Missing it silently disables the docs page for the component.

rule.statement: Cover every visual variant from union prop types with a named story export. One story per distinct visual state.
Define argTypes for every prop: control type matches the TypeScript type, description from JSDoc. This makes the Controls panel functional.
Include a play function for every story that has user-interactive props (onClick, onChange, onSubmit). Use @storybook/test imports, never @storybook/jest or @storybook/testing-library.
rule.rationale: @storybook/jest was removed. Training data still imports from the old package; it causes runtime errors.

section.title: Deterministic Data Rule

rule.statement: Give stories deterministic data: fixed dates with MockDate, fixed UUIDs, suppressed animations. Random or time-dependent data causes false visual diffs in Chromatic.

section.reference: CSF3 story template with all required elements
